reason: The statement applies because the text describes a situation where Shadrach, Meshach, and Abednego faced a great threat of being cast into a burning fiery furnace for not worshiping the golden image set up by King Nebuchadnezzar. Despite the imminent danger, they stood firm in their faith and refused to bow down to any other god except their own. This defiance led to their miraculous deliverance from the fiery furnace, demonstrating a meaningful starting over following the threat of destruction.
